summary: Iteration 2 e2e testing of new features: Emergent Object Storage uploads, /api/files serving, Auth (Mongo-seeded admin session), Admin RBAC + CRUD (products, gallery, orders, contacts), and Gemini Nano Banana AI mockup generation. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passing. Frontend: all 4 critical flows passing (artwork upload + WhatsApp link with artwork URL, login button redirect to auth.emergentagent.com, /admin protected redirect, /admin tabs + editor with seeded session cookie).

minor.issue: Returns 200 on create instead of 201. Functional but not strictly REST.
Iteration_1 backend_test references GET /api/orders but that route does not exist in server.py. Old test would now fail — left untouched since not in scope of this iteration.

action_items: Optional: change /api/admin/products POST to return HTTP 201 on create.
Optional: fix iteration_1 backend_test_test_create_order_persists - it calls GET /api/orders which is not implemented (either add list route or drop that assertion).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py auth_session uses synchronous `requests.get` to call Emergent OAuth — blocks the FastAPI event loop. Consider httpx.AsyncClient.

storage.put_object also uses sync `requests` from within async endpoints (/api/upload, /api/admin/generate-mockup) — blocks the event loop. For high concurrency, switch to async http client or run_in_executor.
/api/upload reads the full file into memory before size check (await file.read()), so a malicious 1 GB upload still consumes RAM. Use chunked reading and abort early when len > 25 MB.
Cookies are set with SameSite=None+Secure which is correct for cross-site (preview domain). Good.
Admin router uses dependencies=[Depends(require_admin)] on the APIRouter — clean and ensures all sub-routes are protected.
session_token uniqueness in user_sessions is not enforced by a unique index. Suggest db.user_sessions.create_index('session_token', unique=True) on startup.
test_credentials: Seeded directly in MongoDB via /app/auth_testing.md pattern. ADMIN session_token=test_session_admin_<ts>, NON-ADMIN session_token=test_session_nonadmin_<ts>. Backend reads token via Authorization: Bearer header; frontend uses session_token cookie (SameSite=None, Secure).
seed_data_creation: Seeded 1 admin user (aielenterprises3321@gmail.com, is_admin=true) and 1 non-admin user with corresponding user_sessions. Test-created TEST_ prefixed products/gallery/orders/contacts were cleaned up after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py and /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. To re-test admin endpoints, re-seed a session via the snippet in /app/auth_testing.md and export TEST_ADMIN_TOKEN / TEST_NONADMIN_TOKEN before running pytest. The 4 seeded product images (regular-round-neck, oversized-tshirt, premium-polo, dry-fit-sports) point to /api/files/<id> with valid image/* bytes (~serve 200). Gemini Nano Banana mockup endpoint returned in <15s during this run.
verified_flows: GET /api/files/<id> serves image/* bytes for all 4 seed products
POST /api/upload (multipart, folder=artwork) accepts small image; 26 MB upload returns 413
POST /api/orders with items[].artwork_url persists the artwork URL
POST /api/auth/session with bad session_id returns 401; missing returns 400
GET /api/auth/me without token=401, with admin token returns is_admin=true
Admin Products CRUD (POST/PUT/DELETE) all 200 and persisted/removed from public /api/products
Admin /api/admin/generate-mockup returns /api/files/<id> backed by real Gemini Nano Banana image
Frontend ProductDetail: artwork-input uploads file, artwork-remove preview appears, whatsapp-order-btn opens wa.me URL containing the artwork /api/files URL
Frontend /admin with seeded session_token cookie -> loads admin-page, all 4 tabs (products/gallery/orders/contacts) visible & switchable, add-product-btn opens product-editor
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs found in this iteration.
